To sum up the liking principle, remember the four things sluice ask themselves to be maximally effective when employing liking. First, have I done enough homework to find all of the meaningful activators and amplifiers of liking so I don't overlook something important? Second, what do I have in common with my audience? That I should highlight. Third, have I shared deserved praise with my customers, clients and colleagues? And fourth, have I identified areas for cooperation?
